method.atr_timing: ATR(20) is LOW when latest ATR(20) <= median of recent ATR(20) values
method.fam_context: nearest gap/channel context is read from FAM state exports when present; missing context stays UNKNOWN
method.long_open_alignment: entry bar high must be above today's RTH open
method.short_open_alignment: entry bar low must be below today's RTH open
